stories: Rates shock lingers: yields stay elevated, Fed-cut timing pushed out
AI/semis unwind deepens: “AI trade” breaks down as chips shed >$1T market cap
Policy optionality jumps: Trump administration and OpenAI reportedly discuss a U.S. government stake
Oil slides in the last hours: crude down ~3% to ~$90.20/bbl
Gold steadies: geopolitics vs. higher real yields remains a tug-of-war
Ukraine expands drone strikes: reported hits on oil depot and port infrastructure
Israel–Lebanon tensions: Hezbollah rejects new ceasefire; Israel says it won’t withdraw troops
Tariff “stack” still bites: U.S.–China overlapping duties remain a margins/inflation swing factor
Crypto deleveraging tell: Bitcoin flushes sub-$60k, ~$1.6B liquidations, then rebounds >$61k
China–Taiwan: reported ADIZ incursions lower vs prior peaks (tactical shift, not “all clear”)
